name: Party Cheese Wreath
recipeInstructions:
Mix cream cheese and cheddar cheese with an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended.
Add bell pepper, onion, Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, and ground pepper; mix well. Refrigerate several hours or overnight.
Place a drinking glass in the center of the serving platter.
Drop round tablespoons of mixture around the glass, just touching the rim, to form a ring; smooth with a spatula.
Remove the glass.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and chopped red bell pepper.
Serve with crackers.
Makes 2 cups.
